footer.messageDescription: Step into the digital world with one message. Our team will get back to you shortly.

quote.title: Get a quote
quote.description: Tell us briefly about your project — we will get back to you.

errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.

contactPage.heroBody: Reach us by email or phone, visit our office, or send a project inquiry - we respond on business days.
contactPage.inquiryDescription: Share your idea or timeline - we will reply on business days.
contactPage.metaDescription: Contact Neetrino to discuss your website, mobile, AI, or product development project.

servicesPage.description: Core directions we ship with: fast delivery, clear business value, and room to scale as you grow.
servicesPage.metaDescription: Explore Neetrino services: websites, mobile apps, SaaS, CRM, AI solutions, and ERP systems.

blogPage.title: Blog
blogPage.description: Insights and notes from Neetrino about product engineering and delivery.

portfolioPage.description: A curated selection of digital products and interfaces delivered for growing businesses across different industries.
portfolioPage.metaDescription: Selected Neetrino projects across web, product design, and digital experiences.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Learn about Neetrino mission, values, expertise, and global delivery experience.
aboutPage.storyShort: Over the past 7 years, Neetrino IT has developed more than 400 online resources, ranging from simple websites to large-scale internet portals and e-commerce platforms.
aboutPage.storySpecialization: We specialize in website development, AI and bot solutions, CRM system integration, mobile app development, as well as SEO and SMM optimization - delivering a comprehensive digital presence for your business.
aboutPage.platformParagraph: Neetrino is the first company to offer website sales through a platform that provides access to over 100,000 professional designs. Our platform enables businesses to quickly and affordably create fully functional websites tailored to modern business needs.
aboutPage.missionBody:
Our goal is to deliver fast, 
affordable, and high-quality 
digital solutions, 
empowering businesses to 
effortlessly build and 
expand their online 
presence, no matter how 
complex the project.
aboutPage.visionBody:
We envision a world 
where businesses of all 
sizes can effortlessly 
establish a strong digital 
presence using our fast, 
cutting-edge 
technological solutions. 
Our aim is to lead the 
transformation of website 
and app development, 
making these tools 
accessible to everyone, 
everywhere.
aboutPage.meetOurTeamIntro: We envision a world where businesses of all sizes can effortlessly establish a strong digital presence using our fast, cutting-edge technological solutions. Our aim is to lead the transformation of website and app development, making these tools accessible to everyone, everywhere.

aboutPage.mobileNeetrinoIntro: Neetrino is the first company to offer website sales through a Platform that provides access to over 100,000 professional designs. Our Platform enables businesses to quickly and affordably create fully functional websites, perfectly tailored to modern business needs. We not only save you time and resources but also guarantee high quality, advanced functionality, and ongoing support—maximizing the efficiency and competitiveness of your online presence.
